panels.description: HTTP access/controller lines and Postgres SQL execute logs. Each line shows service, path, SQL op, session/request ids, then the message.

targets.query: ((service:"exercises-java" OR service:"exercises-rust" OR service:"exercises-python" OR service:"exercises-react-node") AND (_exists_:path OR _exists_:fields.path OR _exists_:controller OR _exists_:request_id OR _exists_:fields.request_id OR _exists_:status OR _exists_:fields.status) AND NOT (path:"/health" OR path:"/api/health" OR path:"/metrics" OR path:"/actuator/prometheus" OR path:"/api/observability/health" OR fields.path:"/health" OR fields.path:"/api/health" OR fields.path:"/metrics" OR fields.path:"/actuator/prometheus" OR fields.path:"/api/observability/health" OR controller:health OR fields.controller:health)) OR (service:"exercises-postgres" AND (message:*execute* OR message:statement*) AND NOT message:duration* AND NOT message:*set_config* AND NOT message:*SELECT 1* AND NOT message:*connection* AND NOT message:*disconnection*)

panels.title: Request & SQL logs
